name: Toronto Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cereal with hot milk in a 1-1/2 quart mixing bowl and let it stand about 10 minutes, or until the cereal has absorbed all of the milk.
2. Beat in the oil and eggs until completely blended.
3. Remove beaters and stir in the cake mix thoroughly but do not overmix or overbeat; the batter will be a bit lumpy.
4. Cover the bowl and let it stand 15 minutes while you preheat the oven to 400°F and grease 12 muffin tin wells with Crisco, evenly.
5. Divide batter equally between the 12 wells.
6. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown. Wipe tops of each muffin while still warm with softened butter or margarine.
